titles.en: Punishment of making the Holy Quran a way to earn money

text: حَدَّثَنِی حَمْزَهُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْعَلَوِیُّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِیمَ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنِ النَّوْفَلِیِّ عَنِ السَّکُونِیِّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ آبَائِهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ الْقُرْآنَ لِیَأْکُلَ بِهِ النَّاسَ جَاءَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ وَجْهُهُ عَظْمٌ لَا لَحْمَ فِیهِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. It was narrated to me by Hamzah b. Muhammad al-Alawi who said I was informed by Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from al-Nawfali from al-Sakuni from Ja’far b. Muhammad from his father from his forefathers (a.s.) who said: that one who recites the Holy Quran for making money, will have no flesh on his face when he comes on the Day of Judgment.
